data.name: MY WIFE IS A FOOTBALL COACH
data.detailed_description:
You will have to play the role of a husband whose wife works as a coach of a soccer team.

In the game you will find:

- One-handed play
- Lots of sex for everyone
- Horny wife trainer
- Ocean of passion and love.

The game has minimal boring scenes and solid porn scenes.

Discover new sexual horizons with your wife!

data.short_description: My wife is a football coach is a visual novel in which your wife coaches a soccer team. Hot story and sexy wife will be waiting for you in the game.

英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 440 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 440 MB 可用空間
